title: MJOLNIR: Emily Prime chat + FatBaby Emily chat screens
body: --findings Two chat screens added to MJOLNIR Android app. Emily Prime chat (POST /chat at emily-agent :8086): ChatMode.EMILY_PRIME route. FatBaby Emily chat (POST /api/ask at newssite :8082): ChatMode.FATBABY_EMILY route. New files: ChatModels.kt, FatBabyClient.kt, ChatRepository.kt, ChatViewModel.kt, ChatScreen.kt. Updated: EmilyApi (added /chat endpoint), NetworkModule (FatBaby Retrofit + FATBABY_BASE_URL), build.gradle.kts (FATBABY_BASE_URL debug=:8082 release=fatbaby.einhorn.industrial), ApplesFeedScreen (Message+BarChart icon buttons), MainActivity (chat/{mode} route).
